name: Ancient Tunnel — Final Chamber
description: The tunnel widens into a circular chamber. The final mural dominates the far wall.{{mural_desc}}
ambient: A faint hum lingers — familiar, like something you've felt before.

description_snippets.mural_desc: The warrior is gone. Only a sword remains, driven into stone.

objects.name: mural
objects.description: The final mural, better preserved than the rest.

on_interact.look:
The wyrm is gone. No body. No corpse.

Only a sword remains, embedded in stone.

The shape is unmistakable.
on_interact.read:
There are faint markings beneath it:

"The worthy bear no wicked words."

on_interact.name: alcove
on_interact.description: A small recess carved into the wall, now visible.

on_interact.look: The alcove contains a single item – a talisman carved from bone.
on_interact.take: You reach into the alcove and retrieve the talisman.
